sections.title: If players were not actively cutting trees nearby

lines.speaker: Woodcutting Leprechaun
lines.text: What an obnoxious tree, spreading rumours 'bout other trees and sucking up all the water.

lines.speaker: Woodcutting Leprechaun
lines.text: Since you're here, I'll let you use me restricted banking services.

lines.speaker: Woodcutting Leprechaun
lines.text: Grand job, what an obnoxious tree, spreading rumours 'bout other trees and sucking up all the water.

lines.speaker: Woodcutting Leprechaun
lines.text: As a reward, I'll let ye use me full banking services!

lines.speaker: Woodcutting Leprechaun
lines.text: It be yer lucky day, Foresters!

lines.speaker: Woodcutting Leprechaun
lines.text: Well, I must be getting on now.
